title: Add Managed Package Filter to Object Selector on Dictionary Page
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to filter objects by managed package when adding objects, so that I can quickly locate package-specific objects in large Salesforce orgs.
description:
Add a dropdown labeled "Objects Related to Managed Package" to the Add Object selection on Dictionary, Migration, and Entity Relationship pages.

### Dropdown Options
- **All Objects**: shows all objects including those unrelated to managed packages
- **All Managed Package Objects**: shows only objects associated with any managed package
- **Specific Managed Package**: lists each available managed package for targeted filtering
acceptance_criteria: Managed package dropdown appears on Dictionary, Migration, and Entity Relationship pages
All Objects option shows all available objects
All Managed Package Objects option filters to only package-related objects
Selecting a specific package filters to that package's objects only
ux_changes: New managed package dropdown filter in the Add Object selection area across Dictionary, Migration, and ER pages.
middleware_changes: Query logic to identify managed package associations for objects and filter accordingly.
implementation_notes: Applied to Dictionary, Migration, and Entity Relationship pages consistently.
comment_summary: Waqar implemented the dropdown with all three filter options and shared screenshots of the UI.
